title: Glovo Champions AI, Awards Kenyan Startup Barcelona Residency at GITEX Kenya 2026
description: Glovo wrapped up its participation at GITEX Kenya 2026 by reinforcing its growing role not only as a technology provider but also as a driver of startup growth and ecosystem development. Alongside championing a more practical and inclusive approach to artificial intelligence, the company used the platform to support entrepreneurship and create pathways for Kenyan [...] The post Glovo Champions AI, Awards Kenyan Startup Barcelona Residency at GITEX Kenya 2026 appeared first on Ghanamma.com .

title: AI Will Help Make a Nobel Prize-Winning Discovery Within a Year
description: An AI system will work with humans to make a Nobel prize-winning discovery within 12 months and tradespeople will be helped by bipedal robots in two years, according to the co-founder of Anthropic. Jack Clark described a “vertiginous sense of progress” in the technology and made a series of predictions, including that companies run solely by AIs would be generating millions of dollars in revenue within 18 months, and that by the end of 2028, AI systems would be able to design their own successors, according to The Guardian.

title: Googlebook, Android 17, Gemini Intelligence, why Google might just lead AI in 2026
description: Coming out of Android Show 2026, Google is weaving its Gemini LLM into Android 17 and Android Auto, while unveiling Googlebook PCs alongside Google Maps 3D, Immersive Navigation, and Quick Share support for AirDrop. With Android phones, tablets and wearables plus services like Search, YouTube and Gmail to take on ChatGPT and Claude, the open questions are availability, device support and languages. The post Googlebook, Android 17, Gemini Intelligence, why Google might just lead AI in 2026 appeared first on TechBullion .

title: How AI Is Turning China’s Micro-Dramas Into a Multi-Billion-Dollar Market
description: China’s AI-generated short drama market is booming as studios use generative AI to cut production costs and scale mobile entertainment.

title: Survey: Nearly half of older Japanese women prefer AI over people for relationship advice
description: Findings point to changing attitudes toward AI companionship and counseling
